# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.30.6 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~103k production LoC across 142 files; ~15k test LoC across 24 suites (including AK3 regression suites, AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite, AK7 foundational regression suite, AK8 model integrity suite, and the AK9 platform regression suite `tests/Ak9PlatformSuite.lean` — 34 end-to-end checks); ~3,045 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) — pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, 76 MED, 101 LOW = 202 findings per E-6 errata). **WS-AK Phases AK1–AK10 COMPLETE** (v0.29.1–v0.30.6); portfolio closed. [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md).
- **Active workstream:** **WS-AN Phase AN0 COMPLETE — Pre-flight** (v0.30.6) — opens the pre-1.0 remediation workstream for the v0.30.6 comprehensive audit ([`AUDIT_v0.30.6_COMPREHENSIVE.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.6_COMPREHENSIVE.md), 196 findings: 2 actionable CRITICAL + 23 actionable HIGH + 71 MEDIUM + 59 LOW + 40 INFO after C-02 already-resolved and H-22 downgraded), decomposed into 11 phases (AN0..AN10) / 79 sub-tasks per [`AUDIT_v0.30.6_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.6_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). AN0-A landed the baseline snapshot ([`AUDIT_v0.30.6_WS_AN_BASELINE.txt`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.6_WS_AN_BASELINE.txt)) — lake build 260 jobs/0 warnings, cargo test 414/0/0, cargo clippy 0 warnings, Theme 4.7 file LOCs (Structural 7626, IF/Operations 3768, Scheduler/Preservation 3633, Cap/Preservation 2461, Lifecycle/Operations 1473), fixture byte-identical (227 lines), zero `sorry`/`axiom`/`native_decide`, 24 Lean suites (~1614 assertions). AN0-B is the plan commit itself; AN0-C is the branch-policy reminder. **Next:** AN1 critical-path blockers (C-01 README "Latest audit" pointer, C-03 pre-commit hook auto-installer, H-24 stale Rust HAL TODOs). Prior: **WS-AK Phases AK1–AK10 COMPLETE — PORTFOLIO CLOSED** (v0.29.1–v0.30.6); AK10-A fixture byte-identical; AK10-B doc sync; AK10-C v0.30.5→v0.30.6 patch bump; AK10-D `AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md` with six clarifications; AK10-E CLAUDE.md large-file list refresh; AK10-F zero `sorry`/`axiom`/`native_decide` verification; AK10-J `AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md` with 11 post-1.0 hardening items (7 hardware-binding, 4 proof-hygiene). Earlier: WS-AM (v0.30.0), WS-AL (v0.29.14), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1–v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7–v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2–v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0–v0.27.1), WS-AF–WS-B.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
- **Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).

Specification documents:

- **seLe4n project spec:** [`docs/spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md`](../spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md) -- normative scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria.
- **seL4 microkernel reference:** [`docs/spec/SEL4_SPEC.md`](../spec/SEL4_SPEC.md) -- detailed summary of the original seL4 kernel semantics.
